reference: It seems that you have an intestinal infection, most likely colitis. If this is happening repeatedly, you should consider the possibility of a food allergy. Please note down which foods cause this problem. This can also be due to waterborne diseases, so check the quality of your water and food sources. A colonoscopy and ultrasonography may be necessary. To rule out gastrointestinal cancer, a computed tomography scan may be necessary. For the moment, consider a course of antibiotics, probiotics, and supportive medications, and observe the results.
text: It seems that you have an intestinal infection, most likely colitis. But this is happening repeatedly, and just consider the possibility of a food allergy. Please note down which foods caused this problem. This can also be due to waterborne diseases. So check the quality of your water and food sources. A colonoscopy and also a colonography may be necessary. To rule out bacterial and protozoan infection, a tomography scan may be necessary. For the moment, consider a course of antibiotics, probiotics, and supported medication. On a further result.
